name: Butterscotch Nut Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt brown sugar and sour cream for an exceptionally rich flavor.
2. Melt butter in a heavy saucepan.
3. Add brown sugar to the melted butter and heat until boiling.
4. Stir in sugar, then add sour cream.
5. Cook over medium heat until the sugar dissolves completely.
6. Increase the temperature slightly to 236°F (118°C).
7. Allow the mixture to cool at room temperature until it reaches a lukewarm consistency.
8. Beat the mixture until it holds its shape and loses its gloss.
9. Add vanilla extract and chopped walnuts, stirring quickly to combine.
10. Pour the fudge into a buttered 8-inch square pan.
11. Let cool completely before cutting into squares.
12. Garnish with walnut halves.
13. Makes about 49 pieces.
